name: Bloater Savoury (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the bloaters on both sides.
2. Remove the skin and bones, then flake the flesh.
3. Add the butter to the fish and blend well.
4. Stir in the Worcestershire sauce and cayenne pepper.
5. Bind with the egg yolks and lemon juice.
6. Mix until a smooth paste is produced.
7. Serve the paste with fingers of hot toast or Suffolk Rusks.
This hot spicy paste was very popular in Edwardian times, when it was served with toast or Suffolk Rusks as an appetizer or a savoury.
8. If bloaters are not available, smoked mackerel can be used instead.
